ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., resuscitation, trauma care) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the skill (e.g., CPR, first aid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responders" (
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each responder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the responder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the responder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the responder (e.g., EMT, AEMT, Paramedic) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the responder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the responder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of responder the course is aimed at (e.g., EMT, AEMT, Paramedic) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., previous certifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the responder is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the responder enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the course (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the responder (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the skill requirement record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that requires the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with the course */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency required for the skill (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_requirements_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder who received the certification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the certification */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., CPR, EMT, Paramedic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the renewal request */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification being renewed */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the renewal request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal request (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the instructor */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the instructor (e.g., EMT, Paramedic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course instructor record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taught by the instructor */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "instructor_role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., lead instructor, assistant instructor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., course reminder, certification renewal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., video, document, presentation) */,
  "material_content" TEXT /* Content of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the poll belongs to */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question asked in the poll */,
  "responses" TEXT /* Responses received for the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id")
)
